sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking purple diamond
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

print("BEFORE key objects:")
for n in before.segmentation['nodes']:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'O', 'G', 'p'] and n['pixels'] >= 12 and n['children']:
        rows = [pt[0] for pt in n['boundary']]
        cols = [pt[1] for pt in n['boundary']]
        center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"  {c}: center~{center}")

print("\nAFTER key objects:")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'O', 'G', 'p'] and n['pixels'] >= 12 and n['children']:
        rows = [pt[0] for pt in n['boundary']]
        cols = [pt[1] for pt in n['boundary']]
        center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"  {c}: center~{center}")

# Check lower chain area
ascii_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLower chain (rows 30-56, cols 30-56):")
for r in range(30, 57):
    line = ascii_lines[r][30:56]
    if any(c not in 'BB' for c in line):
        print(f"  {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
